commit_scope: Admit url-encode and uuid to the fourth-arm manifest after the literal/value equality survey showed fkwu parity.

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for i, line in enumerate(Path('docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl').read_text().splitlines(), 1):

local_validation.notes: The refreshed fourth-arm survey showed url-encode single-pass at 16 and uuid single-pass at 15. After rebasing over PR #3024's text-summary and LLM feature rows, full Form validation reports fourth arm: 152 band(s) four-way with 568 ok and 0 divergent. The metal-plane audit passes macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF receipts. Session, symbols, xpath, and record remain outside this ratchet because their refreshed survey rows still mismatch.
